entry.title: Message No. KT299
entry.content: How do i solve this error message: Differing charts of accounts: INT - ZAB2 Message No. KT299

entry.title: Charging account assignment for PO with SES
entry.content: Hello, I have a Purchase Order that was created with the incorrect account assignment. There have been multiple service entry sheet and AP Invoice as well. I would like to change the account assignment to the correct one at PO level, so that future SES will go against the correct object. Can this be done? Thanks!

entry.title: Bank Key (length) validation - Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear Community,

validation of bank key length in S/4HANA has changed (is different), comparing S/4HANA OnPrem (Release 2023) with S/4HANA Public Cloud (Rel 2502) - as per attached illustration "Length of Bank Key Check - changed". SAP delivered country valiations (e.g. for Romania, but also other countries) has changed from 15 characters to only 11 chars (in 2502). Suprising, as length of bank key by country, is expected to be determined by local bank authorities (not shifting dependent on SAP product). Kindly review and advise. 

Best regards,
Frank

entry.title: Nota SAP leiaute versão 019 do Sped
entry.content:
Boa tarde, este ano já deveríamos estar enviando o layout 19 do SPED, mas até o momento não encontrei nenhuma nota da SAP sobre essa atualização. Alguém aqui já localizou essa nota?

Nota Técnica 2024.001 v1.0 (leiaute versão 019)

estamos com o layout 018

entry.title: VAT splitted in transaction Code FB60 S4HANA ON PREMISE
entry.content:
Goodmorning Expert,

in S4HANA On Premise 2022 when I try to post a vendor invoice, for an Italian company, with two Gl account line items (also the same GL account) with the same VAT code for both line items,  the document posted  shows two line items for the automatically calculated VAT and not just one (one for each line items of GL Account).

In the system and for the company code is not active the splitting document functionality.

If I try to post the same document with the transaction code FBR2 or FB01 or MIRO, the posted document is correct.

Do you have any ideas on how to solve it?

entry.title: In IFRS16, post the total value of the contract to the standard liability
entry.content:
Good morning
In the IFRS16 process we are using the direct entry in the balance sheet for the standard, with this making the entries in the ASSET, DEPRECIATION COMPENSATION and INTEREST account according to the IFRS16 standard, our client wants to standard the entry of the CONTRACT VALUE in a LIABILITY account, could you help us?

entry.title: IFRS16 Solution for Defer Interest Posting
entry.content:
Hi

For IFRS16 figure has the following figure: Contract Value THB 200,000, Present Value THB 180,000.

Standard SAP will capitalized asset by posting

Dr. ROU Asset 180,000

  Cr. Asset Clearing 180,000

Dr. Asset Clearing 180,000

  Cr. Lease Liability 180,000

If my client wants to have additional posting for Defer Interest with the following entry: -

Dr. Defer Interest 20,000

  Cr. Lease Liability 20,000

Is there any BADI to insert the following entry upon posting to FI.

Thank you.

Kai

entry.title: SAP ECC Automatic Payment Advise
entry.content:
Hello,


I have been going around the forum, but cannot seem to grasp the concept. Anyone that can help me understand how I can set up that our business partners ( B2B ) receive notifications via email once their invoice has been paid? As far as I understood from previous post with similar topics is that this is an ABAP Functionality, as the transaction starts with Z.  I have been checking also in YouTube, but if anyone can advise me on this, or if anyone has time for a short call a couple of minutes - Please, reach out to me.


You can contact me via email or Microsoft Teams for a short call, if it will be easier - nikola.lyudmilov@gmail.com.


Thank you,
Nikola Nikolov

entry.title: T.code CJ8G acquisition value negative in depreciation area 15
entry.content: T.code CJ8G acquisition value negative in depreciation area 15

entry.title: LTMC for Open Items in FI-CA (PSCD, FPE1) – Missing Migration Object?
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I want to use LTMC to migrate open items in FI-CA (PSCD, FPE1). However, I cannot find a suitable migration object for this scenario.

My questions:

  1. Is there a predefined migration object for open items in FI-CA?
  2. If not, what would be the best approach? Should I create a custom migration object using LTMC or would LSMW be the better alternative?
  3. Are there any best practices or experiences regarding this specific use case?

Both approaches are new to me, so I would greatly appreciate any guidance or insights.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: F-90 with posting key 70 to Asset AUC . ERROR "Acquisition value negative in Area 01"
entry.content:
Dear SAPGurus,

i had a case when i post asset AUC in F-90.

When i post or simulate, it show ERROR "Acquisition value negative in Area 01"

I Attach the data that i post in F-90

I read some post that the solution is to tick the "Negative Value Allowed" using AS02 in depreciation Area

what I want to ask is , why when in posting key 70 - we entered the value for asset AUC with a positive value but SAP said  "Acquisition value was negative in Area 01" ? 

Could you tell me the root cause ?

For the information.  asset value for asset 911000112 is still plenty

entry.title: Can you reuse a Cost Center Number if deleted ?
entry.content: I created Cost center 123456 with the incorrect Name. I then deleted this. I do want to use this number , however it retains the description from the deleted cost center. Is it not possible to reuse ?

entry.title: FSCM CashMgm: Fully delivered and invoiced displayed as liquidity item
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

We have several POs with fully delivered and fully invoiced statuses that are being displayed in the Cash Flow Analyzer as liquidity items.

If I manually flag the Final Invoice field, the PO is no longer displayed. However, if there is an invoice reversal, the flow is not updated anymore.

Have you ever faced it?  Is there any SAP Note to fix it?

Thanks, 

BR

RL

entry.title: In Treasury I am getting error " Event Linkage Not Active"
entry.content:
Hi Experts

When I try to create a Financial Document with FTR_Create I get error " Event Linkage Not Active"

Please help me resolve the issue

entry.title: Reference document number in Intercompany Matching Reconciliation
entry.content:
Hi Community,

How reference document number (XBLR)/assignment number (ZUONR) is generated in document?

entry.title: S4HANA Vendor Condition Contract settlement error 0P2
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

 

in S4HANA vendor condition contract rebate settlement WB2R_SC. Got error WS043 

"Error in account determination for account key 0P2"

 

but I have set in OBYC for 0P1, 0P2, 0P3 already.

Pls advise

entry.title: Dunning procedure works for -1 and 1 days in arrears but not for 0
entry.content:
Hi,

For dunning procedure 1000, we want a line item to be dunned when the due date is 0. When you dun only one line item whose due date is the current day, the system does not dun it. However, if you enter it with a set of documents then the system does it right. In addition, we have tested to claim the line item when it is still one day overdue and when it is already one day overdue, and the system does it well. But when it is due today the following message appears: "highest dys in arrrs 0 smaller than min.arrrs 1-, no dunn.not." For us it does not make sense since it does it right when it is /- 1 due.

entry.title: JWT Token
entry.content:
How can I translate the postman screen in the image as abap.

There is an api POST but I could not integrate it with sap.

It works via Postman.

Thank you in advance everyone

entry.title: How to Upload G/L Master data Template in Public Cloud 2502 Version
entry.content:
Dear all,

We need to upload G/L master data template in SAP S4HANA Public cloud, but we couldn't find any path or provision in the system. Please suggest us way, how to upload G/L master data?

 

Thanks & Regards

Uddhav B.

entry.title: Can you set up exchange rates in sap ecc automatically without any additional software?
entry.content:
Hello,

 

i have been reading around the forum and I found a couple of posts about this, but I am not completely sure. Is it possible to set up automatic exchange rate upload in SAP ECC or do you need to use an external software that sends data from the governmental website to SAP? I will need to do this for Romania and Bulgaria, but also other countries in the future.

 

 

Thank you for your time,

Nikola Nikolov
